name: @platform/adapters-object-storage
description: Object storage adapter: AWS S3 client, presigned URL generation, and storage-runtime interface implementation.

readme.summary: Object storage adapter: AWS S3 client, presigned URL generation, and storage-runtime interface implementation.
responsibilities: Implement the storage-runtime upload and retrieval interface using the AWS S3 SDK
Generate presigned upload and download URLs with configurable TTLs
Enforce bucket naming conventions and access policies
Handle S3 multipart upload for large files
nonResponsibilities: Does not define the storage interface (owned by storage-runtime)
Does not own content validation, virus scanning, or CDN configuration
Does not manage S3 bucket lifecycle policies or replication rules
usage: Registered at application startup as the concrete storage provider
Feature packages request presigned URLs through the storage-runtime interface
operationalNotes: AWS credentials are resolved from the instance role or config-runtime — never hardcoded
Bucket names and regions are resolved from config-runtime
